revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th-century_Japanese_philosophers here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
